name: Garlicky Gilroy Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 3 Heads fresh garlic, separated into cloves and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Disjoint chicken wings, removing tips. Rinse wings; pat dry.
3. Place garlic, 1 cup oil and Tabasco in food processor or blender container. Cover and process until smooth. Pour garlic mixture into a small bowl.
4. Combine cheese, bread crumbs and black pepper in a shallow dish.
5. Dip wings into garlic mixture, then roll one at a time in crumb mixture until thoroughly coated.
6. Brush a nonstick pan with remaining 1 tbsp oil; arrange wings in a single layer. Drizzle remaining garlic mixture over wings; sprinkle with remaining crumb mixture.
7. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes, tossing occasionally if desired.
